text.title: Plausible Analytics Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Static or SPA site AND founder wants cookieless analytics AND no replay needed?

branch.when: site_type in ['static','spa'] AND wants_cookieless == true AND needs_session_replay == false
